zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Payne de Tibetot 1st Baron Tybetot於1279年11月11日出生在英國坎布利其爾時，他的父親Robert de Tibetot51歲，母親Eva de Chaworth30歲。他於1311年9月3日之前與Agnes de Roos在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他於1314年登記服兵役。他在英國諾薩普頓史爾被列為keeper of northampton castle。他去世於1314年6月24日在蘇格蘭斯林史爾班諾可本享年34歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Payne de Tibetot 1st Baron Tybetot于1279年11月11日出生在英国坎布利其爾时，他的父亲Robert de Tibetot51岁，母亲Eva de Chaworth30岁。他于1311年9月3日之前与Agnes de Roos在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他于1314年登记服兵役。他在英国諾薩普頓史爾被列为keeper of northampton castle。他去世于1314年6月24日在苏格兰斯林史爾班諾可本享年34岁。

German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Payne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Elaborated spelling of   Jane  , a form popularized no doubt by the American actress  Jayne Mansfield  (  Vera Jayne Palmer ,  1933–67 ) and British ice-dancer  Jayne Torvill  (  b. 1957 ).

variants.name: Jane
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Payne de Tibetot 1st Baron Tybetot was born on 11 November 1279, in Cambridgeshire, England, his father, Robert de Tibetot, was 51 and his mother, Eva de Chaworth, was 30. He married Agnes de Roos before 3 September 1311, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He registered for military service in 1314. His occupation is listed as keeper of northampton castle in Northamptonshire, England. He died on 24 June 1314, in Bannockburn, Stirlingshire, Scotland, at the age of 34.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Payne de Tibetot 1st Baron Tybetot est né le 11 novembre 1279, à Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, son père, Robert de Tibetot, avait 51 ans et sa mère, Eva de Chaworth, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Agnes de Roos avant 3 septembre 1311, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1314. Sa profession de son indiquée est keeper of northampton castle à Northamptonshire, Angleterre. Il est décédé le 24 juin 1314, à Bannockburn, Stirlingshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 34 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Payne de Tibetot 1st Baron Tybetot am 11. November 1279 in Cambridgeshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert de Tibetot 51 und seine Mutter Eva de Chaworth 30. Er hat vor 3. September 1311 in England, United Kingdom Agnes de Roos geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er hat sich 1314 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. sein Beruf ist als keeper of northampton castle in Northamptonshire, England aufgeführt. Er starb am 24. Juni 1314 im Alter von 34 Jahren in Bannockburn, Stirlingshire, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Payne de Tibetot 1st Baron Tybetot è nato il il 11 novembre 1279 nel Cambridgeshire, England, il suo padre, Robert de Tibetot, aveva 51 anni e il suo madre, Eva de Chaworth, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Agnes de Roos prima del 3 settembre 1311, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1314. La sua occupazione è indicata come keeper of northampton castle nel Northamptonshire, England. Morì il 24 giugno 1314, nel Bannockburn, Stirlingshire, Scotland, all'età di 34 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Payne de Tibetot 1st Baron Tybetotが1279年11月11日にイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアで生まれた時，父Robert de Tibetotは51歳，母Eva de Chaworthは30歳であった。1311年9月3日以前にイギリスイギリスでAgnes de Roosと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1314年に兵役登録をした。イギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアでの職業はkeeper of northampton castleと記録されている。彼は1314年6月24日にスコットランドスティルリングシュアイアバノクブルンで34歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Payne de Tibetot 1st Baron Tybetot(이)가 1279년 11월 11일 영국 캄브리지실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de Tibetot(은)는 51세였고, 그의 어머니 Eva de Chaworth(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1311년 9월 3일 이전 영국 잉글랜드에서 Agnes de Roos(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1314년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그의 직업은 영국 노르섬프토실르에서 keeper of northampton castle이었다. 그는 1314년 6월 24일 스컷랜드 스티를링실르 반옥k번에서 34세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.11 Nov 1279–24 Jun 1314: 1279 оны Арваннэгдүгээр сарын 11–1314 оны Зургаадугаар сарын 24

pt.11 Nov 1279–24 Jun 1314: 11 de novembro de 1279–24 de junho de 1314
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Payne de Tibetot 1st Baron Tybetot nasceu em 11 de novembro de 1279, em Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert de Tibetot, tinha 51 anos e sua mãe, Eva de Chaworth, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes de Roos antes 3 de setembro de 1311, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1314. Sua profissão aparece como keeper of northampton castle em Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 24 de junho de 1314, em Bannockburn, Stirlingshire, Scotland, com 34 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Payne de Tibetot 1st Baron Tybetot родился 11 ноября 1279 г. в местности камбриджешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert de Tibetot было 51 год, а матери, которую звали Eva de Chaworth, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes de Roos перед 3 сентябрь 1311 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. В 1314 году он поступил на военную службу. Работал по профессии keeper of northampton castle в местности нортамптоншир, Англия. Он умер 24 июня 1314 г. в местности банноккбурн, стирлингшир, Шотландия в возрасте 34 лет.

es.11 Nov 1279–24 Jun 1314: 11 de noviembre de 1279–24 de junio de 1314
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Payne de Tibetot 1st Baron Tybetot nació el 11 de noviembre de 1279, en Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert de Tibetot, tenía 51 años y su mamá, Eva de Chaworth, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Agnes de Roos antes de 3 de septiembre de 1311, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1314. Su ocupación registrada era keeper of northampton castle en Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Murió el 24 de junio de 1314, en Bannockburn, Stirlingshire, Scotland, a la edad de 34 años.
